Privacy Policy of Nutrition Arvanitis

Effective Date: 2024

  1. Introduction

    Welcome to Nutrition Arvanitis. This privacy policy is crafted with our commitment to protect your privacy. We understand that when you choose our nutrition consultation services, you trust us with your personal information. This policy explains how we handle, store, and protect your personal data and adheres to industry standards and legal requirements.

  2. Personal Information Collected

    In the course of providing personalized nutrition consultation, we collect and process the following personal information:

    • Age:This helps us understand your life stage and tailor nutritional advice accordingly.

    • Name:We use this to create a personal connection and maintain records for future reference.

    • Email and Phone:These are crucial for efficient communication, sending appointment reminders, updates, and follow-up consultations.

    • Health Information:Including but not limited to dietary habits, medical history, and specific health concerns, to ensure our advice is as relevant and safe as possible.

    This data is collected through secure online forms, consultation sessions, and client interactions.

  3. Use of Personal Data

    Your data is central to our service. Here's how we use it:

    • Tailored Nutritional Advice: By analyzing your age, health information, and dietary preferences, we create a customized nutrition plan.

    • Communication:Your contact details are used to schedule consultations, provide diet plans, and any necessary follow-up.

    We ensure that your data is used strictly for these purposes and not for unsolicited marketing.

  4. User Rights

    You have full control over your personal data:

    • Access:You can ask us for a copy of the personal data we hold about you.

    • Deletion:Request the removal of your data from our records, subject to any legal obligations we might have to retain it.

    • Rectification:Correct any inaccuracies in your data to ensure our records are up to date.

    To exercise these rights, please reach out to us using the contact information below.

  5. Data Security

    Your data's security is paramount. We employ robust cybersecurity measures, including encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits, to prevent unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction of your personal information.

  6. Policy Changes

    We may update this policy to reflect changes in our practices or legal obligations. When we do, we'll revise the “Effective Date” at the top of this policy and take reasonable steps to inform you of significant changes.

  7. Contact Information

    For queries regarding this policy or your data, contact us at:

    • Phone:+34613497305

    • Email:thymiosarvanitis@e-nutritionist.com

  8. Acknowledgment and Consent

    By using Nutrition Arvanitis’ services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to the terms of this Privacy Policy, and consent to the collection, use, and processing of your personal information as described herein.
